text: NASA's Perseverance rover successfully collected rock samples from Jezero Crater on Mars.
The CDC says vaccines help prevent severe illness from COVID-19.
Reuters reported that inflation eased for the third straight month.
The WHO recommended continued hand hygiene to reduce infection risk.
JPL announced a new Mars mission technology demonstration.
A miracle pill cures every disease overnight with no side effects.
Scientists secretly proved the Earth is flat, according to anonymous insiders.
A celebrity drink instantly reverses aging and restores youth in one week.
The government confirmed aliens are controlling weather satellites.
A secret recipe can make anyone invisible after one use.
The WHO said there is no evidence that 5G causes COVID-19.
A chart proves crime doubled after the city installed new street lights.
A report says the vaccine causes infertility, but the article only cites a small anecdote.
A viral post claims coffee is more dangerous than smoking, based on one misleading graph.
The video suggests the eclipse was faked with CGI, despite contrary astronomical evidence.
A fake headline says NASA never landed on Mars, while official mission updates say the rover is active.
The article claims the weather agency denied the storm, but the agency issued a public alert.
A post claims vaccination was banned globally, but public health agencies list active vaccination programs.
This sentence discusses a fictional dragon council debating moon taxation.
Quantum sandcastles sing to the ocean in a future alphabet of colors.
